mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TkexamRsltDAO.profMemoSelect 설 명 : 교수메모조회 */ SELECT #{tkexamId} AS TKEXAM_ID , #{userId} AS USER_ID , (SELECT PROF_MEMO FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT WHERE TKEXAM_ID = #{tkexamId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}) AS PROF_MEMO FROM DUAL
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : TkexamRsltDAO.profMemoModify 설 명 : 교수메모수정 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT TKEXAM_RSLT USING ( SELECT #{tkexamRsltId} AS TKEXAM_RSLT_ID , #{tkexamId} AS TKEXAM_ID , #{userId} AS USER_ID , #{profMemo} AS PROF_MEMO , #{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID FROM DUAL ) USR ON ( TKEXAM_RSLT.TKEXAM_ID = USR.TKEXAM_ID AND TKEXAM_RSLT.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TKEXAM_RSLT.PROF_MEMO = USR.PROF_MEMO , TKEXAM_RSLT.MDFR_ID = USR.RGTR_ID , TKEXAM_RSLT.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TKEXAM_RSLT_ID , TKEXAM_ID , USER_ID , PROF_MEMO , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( USR.TKEXAM_RSLT_ID , USR.TKEXAM_ID , USR.USER_ID , USR.PROF_MEMO , USR.RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() )

/* SQL ID : TkexamRsltDAO.userTkexamRsltInit 설 명 : 사용자시험응시결과초기화 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT SET MDFR_ID = #{rgtrId} , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , PROF_MEMO = NULL , ATCH_CTS = NULL , FDBK_CTS = NULL , FDBK_DTTM = NULL , FDBKR_ID = NULL , TOT_SCR = NULL WHERE TKEXAM_ID = #{tkexamId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
